questions.question: Which improvements should I make to the Question component?

options.label: Highlight chosen option
options.description: When answered, mark the option matching the answer (by value/label) as selected, so the resolution reads at a glance. Falls back to the raw answer line when nothing matches.

options.label: Tighten pending hint
options.description: Show the target-focus hint only when the provider offers no fixed options, so option-based questions stay compact.

options.label: De-emphasize resolved
options.description: Dim/mute dismissed, failed, and superseded cards so the live pending question stands out in the transcript.
